---
title: "Exercise 4. Images, videos and documents"
---

![](/images/Alice.jpg)
Drag and drop the image to the folder from computer to the folder on quatro

![](/images/Alice.jpg){width=50%}


![](/images/Alice.jpg){fig-align="center"}

![](/images/Alice.jpg){.lightbox}

![Photograph of South Cloisters on St Lukes Campus](/images/Alice.jpg)

[![](/images/Alice.jpg)](https://medicine.exeter.ac.uk/research/facilities/southcloisters/)

![](/images/Alice.jpg){fig-alt="Photograph of South Cloisters on St Lukes Campus"}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Oc7WuYfGbrA?si=HBfHbbjPtaevBxpD >}}

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Oc7WuYfGbrA?si=HBfHbbjPtaevBxpD" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
This is the embed link from youtube

<iframe width="100%" height="500" src="https://experts.exeter.ac.uk/42920-deepthi-lavu" title="Quarto Documentation"></iframe>


<embed src="/images/Poster for APEx celebrations.pdf" width="100%" height="1000px" />
